metadata.name: Return Off-Spec Raw Material to Vendor

description: An incoming raw material failed QC testing and needs to be returned to the supplier.

nodes.task_description: Identify the quarantined, off-spec lot of material in the inventory system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the correct batch that needs to be returned.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier to obtain a Return Material Authorization (RMA) number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates with the supplier and receives an RMA number.

nodes.task_description: Create a return shipment in the logistics system using the RMA number and schedule a pickup.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the return order and arranges for the carrier to pick it up.
